title: aspidium pubirachis
intro: Aspidium pubirachis, also known as the "Fern of the Forest," is a species of fern belonging to the family Polypodiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Aspidium pubirachis include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, Aspidium pubirachis is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to the skin.
